title: Christmas escapade
body:
This is a cool "little" modpack that adds a bunch a **christmas related** mods **+** some cool **utility** and **performance** mods and some **custom world gen** too :)

in this modpack you will find for terrain generation:** Terralith, Geophilic and better snowy slopes**. For performance there is: **sodium, lithium, noisium, immediatly fast and more**. You will find **Snow!Real magic!, snowy spirit, snow default, always snow, better snow coverage**, and a bunch more for the christmas spririt **and a lot more other mod for the asthetic and just some cool block, items and feature for christmas** I HAVE MADE NONE OF THESE MODS ALL OF THE CREDIT ARE GIVEN TO THE CREATORS THAT HAVE CREATED THESE AMAZING MODS!.

this modpack has been made for player to have a amazing christmas in and out of the game! Hope you enjoy it! and HAPPY CHRISTMAS EVERY ONE!!!

( i have also included some texture pack and shaders to amplify the asthectic :) )
